topic: Perplexity AI search methodology, answer synthesis patterns

entries.a: Vane is a privacy-focused AI answering engine that runs entirely on your own hardware.

Vane supports features such as smart search modes, pick your sources, widgets, web search powered by SearxNG, image and video search, file uploads, search specific domains, smart suggestions, and search history.
Vane can be installed using Docker or without Docker. Using Docker is highly recommended as it simplifies the setup process.

entries.q: What is SearxNG and how is it related to Vane?
entries.a: SearxNG is a search engine that Vane uses to power its web search feature. Vane can be used with a bundled SearxNG instance or with an existing SearxNG instance.

entries.q: Can I use Vane with my own AI models?
entries.a: Yes, Vane supports local LLMs (Ollama) and cloud providers (OpenAI, Claude, Groq), allowing you to mix and match models based on your needs.
Yes, Vane is open-source and free, with its development powered by the generous support of its sponsors.

entries.q: How can I configure my Vane settings?
entries.a: You can configure your Vane settings, such as API keys and models, directly in the setup screen after installing and running Vane.

entries.q: What are the benefits of using Vane?
entries.a: Vane provides accurate answers with cited sources while keeping your searches completely private, making it a great option for those who value their online privacy.
